## Why It Works

This post works because the 2-line hook reels in entrepreneurs and then gives them a very simple 6 questions to consider. People love actionable listicles like this.

## Template

Great {Role} don't {Thing to Avoid}.
They nail the {opposite}.
Here are the 6 fundamentals you need to get right:
1. {Fundamental #1}
{Related Question}
2. {Fundamental #2}
{Related Question}
3. {Fundamental #3}
{Related Question}
4. {Fundamental #4}
{Related Question}
5. {Fundamental #5}
{Related Question}
6. {Fundamental #6}
{Related Question}
Starting a {relevant journey} is hard.
There's no easy steps to getting it right.
But, if you nail these 6 fundamentals, you'll give yourself a great chance to succeed.
